characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Aerith and Bob: All the Guppies except for Molly and to a lesser extent Gil have rather unusual-sounding names. Five-Token Band: Molly is Hispanic, Nonny, Gil and Deema are white (and Deema is implied to beJewish), Oona is Asian, and Goby and Zooli are both Black/African American (though Zooli could be Blasian based on her appearance). Four-Temperament Ensemble:Phlegmatic: Molly and Oona. The former is the well-behaved leader who is the most level-headed, while the latter is the nicest and most caring.Sanguine: Gil and Deema. The former is the accident-prone and silly cohost, while the latter is the zaniest and goofiest, who is most excitable.Choleric: Goby and Zooli. The former is the most imaginative and a bit impulsive, and the latter is theSixth Rangerand a wild animal lover.Melancholic: Nonny. He stands out the most from the rest of the group, being the most serious and intelligent who doesn't smile as much and the least emotive. Phlegmatic: Molly and Oona. The former is the well-behaved leader who is the most level-headed, while the latter is the nicest and most caring. Sanguine: Gil and Deema. The former is the accident-prone and silly cohost, while the latter is the zaniest and goofiest, who is most excitable.

characters.name: As a whole
characters.description: Aerith and Bob: All the Guppies except for Molly and to a lesser extent Gil have rather unusual-sounding names. Five-Token Band: Molly is Hispanic, Nonny, Gil and Deema are white (and Deema is implied to beJewish), Oona is Asian, and Goby and Zooli are both Black/African American (though Zooli could be Blasian based on her appearance). Four-Temperament Ensemble:Phlegmatic: Molly and Oona. The former is the well-behaved leader who is the most level-headed, while the latter is the nicest and most caring.Sanguine: Gil and Deema. The former is the accident-prone and silly cohost, while the latter is the zaniest and goofiest, who is most excitable.Choleric: Goby and Zooli. The former is the most imaginative and a bit impulsive, and the latter is theSixth Rangerand a wild animal lover.Melancholic: Nonny. He stands out the most from the rest of the group, being the most serious and intelligent who doesn't smile as much and the least emotive. Phlegmatic: Molly and Oona. The former is the well-behaved leader who is the most level-headed, while the latter is the nicest and most caring. Sanguine: Gil and Deema. The former is the accident-prone and silly cohost, while the latter is the zaniest and goofiest, who is most excitable.

characters.name: Molly
characters.description: A bubbly guppy girl and the host of the show, along with Gil. Aerith and Bob: The only one of the group with a "typical" name, though Gil counts as well. Bare Midriffs Are Feminine: She wears a blue and cyan bikini top that matches the pattern of her tail, and also exposes her belly. Growling Gut: Happens in "Swimtastic Check-Up!" The Leader: Of the Guppies themselves. The first few seconds of the intro even solidifies this by displaying her as the top center Guppy.

characters.name: Gil
characters.description: A silly guppy boy and the co-host of the show. Aerith and Bob: Gil, while uncommon, is a real name, unlike Oona and Nonny and the others. Butt-Monkey: He's always shown getting into any form of trouble several times, especially in the Molly and Gil segments. Cowardly Lion: He's even scared of his owndog. Curtains Match the Window: He has blue hair and blue eyes.

characters.name: Goby
characters.description: The creative guppy boy with imaginative thought and loves to tell stories. Break the Cutie: He does not take it very well after losing his toy dump truck in "Construction Psyched". Keet: As is with Gil, he's also energetic. Meaningful Name: A goby is a species of small fish, not unlike a guppy. Mr. Imagination: He is imaginative most of the times.

characters.name: Deema
characters.description: The goofy and dramatic guppy girl whose personality is as big as her hair. Ambiguously Jewish: During a song in the episode "Holiday Pirates!", Deema is shown to seperated from her friends during Thanksgiving and is seen at a Hanukkah celebration. Bare Midriffs Are Feminine: Like with Molly, her bikini top, which is the same colors and pattern as her tail, is enough to show her belly. Birthday Episode: She has one in "Fogzilla!". Catchphrase: "Really?", "Well, you'vecertainlycome to the right place!".

characters.name: Oona
characters.description: The sweet-natured guppy girl with a great amount of empathy. Catchphrase: "Makes sense to me!" Cheerful Child: Has a very cheerful disposition. The Cutie: She's pretty darn cute. The Dragon: She becomes this to Windy Pete in "Ocean Patrol!", at least until herHeel–Face Turn.

characters.name: Nonny
characters.description: The smart and cautious guppy boy who would rather define the word "basketball" than play it. Aside Glance: While almost all characters look at the camera and break the fourth wall on a regular basis, Nonny seems to be extra found of the former, such as when he reacts to his strange lunches, and hisexpression while doing sobest fits the "character acknowledging the events that are happening are weird/absurd" definition. Birthday Episode: He has one in "Secret Agent Nonny!". Blind Without 'Em: Can't see well without his goggle-glasses. Bond One-Liner: Yes,really.Rotten Tomato:(whilst trapped in a ketchup bottle)You got me, but I'll get you next time!Nonny:If you can"ketchup."(smirkstowards the camera)

characters.name: Zooli
characters.description: A new member of the guppies, introduced in Season 5. A thoughtful guppy girl with an encyclopedic knowledge of animals. Birthday Episode: She has one in "The Three Guppeteers!". Meaningful Name: She loves animals so much, she can find them at the zoo(li). Prim and Proper Bun: Her usual hairstyle. Sixth Ranger: Joins the guppy gang in the fifth season.

characters.name: Bubble Puppy
characters.description: Bewitched Amphibians: Turns into a frog in one episode. He turns back into a puppy by the end, though. Forced Transformation: "In Bubble Puppy's Fin-tastic Fairy Tale Adventure!" Ridiculously Cute Critter: A cute doggy mixed with an even cuter fishy.

characters.name: Mr. Grouper
characters.description: Big Fun: He's a big fish who often joins in on the guppies' playtime and receives lots of comfort from them. Catchphrase: "Excuse me, what time is it?" and "Line up, everybody! It's time to go outside!" Chameleon Camouflage: He can change his natural orange into a variety of different patterns and colors. Cool Teacher: He's friendly and a very good teacher. Demoted to Extra: Aside from both a few story segments (which became essentially the entire episode by that point) and in "Zooli's New Pet!"note(the only episode within the revival series to not feature either the outside song and story segment), his overall screen time in seasons 5-6 became relegated to merely the first five or so minutes of the episode, with a brief appearance right before the reprising of the intro.

characters.name: Little Fish
characters.description: Don't Explain the Joke: Oftentimes after the lunchpuns, they'll swim off and proceed to explain exactly why the pun is a pun. They essentially serve as anaudience surrogate.Little Fish:"That's silly!"

characters.name: Mr. Grumpfish
characters.description: Jerk with a Heart of Gold: He may be a big grumpy guy most of the time, but he does have a good side to him. Meaningful Name: He's a REALLY grumpy fish. Running Gag: Whenever he starts to sing, he would let out a big "Ohhh!", that would blow Deema away.
